meaning: adj.平凡的,陈腐的,老一套的
examples: The lyrics of the song are embarrassingly banal.
For example, in the highly successful science-fiction film 2001, little dialogue was evident, and most of it was banal and of little intrinsic interest.
Because, for all the most ordinary, all the most banal reasons, he was doomed.
The actual facts, however, on closer examination tend to be much more ambivalent and banal.
